notableEvents.label: Jung Hoo Lee GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee grounds into a double play, second baseman Bryson Stott to shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper. Heliot Ramos out at 2nd. Jung Hoo Lee out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: J.T. Realmuto GIDP
notableEvents.detail: J.T. Realmuto grounds into a double play, third baseman Matt Chapman to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Brandon Marsh out at 2nd. J.T. Realmuto out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Umpire reviewed (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Adolis García steals (1) 2nd base.
